cve.contentSnippet: The GDPR cookies module for Backdrop CMS (before 1.x-1.3.5) doesn't sufficiently protect visitors from Cross Site Scripting (XSS) if a malicious value has been provided for the optional 'Info content' field for the YouTube service. This is mitigated by the fact that an attacker m

This affects the function getServerSideProps of the file frontend/src/pages/auth/signIn.tsx of the component Sign-in Auto-Redirect. The manipulation of the argument redirect results in cross site script

cve.title: CVE-2026-9518 - hemant6488 CodeIgniter-StudentManagementSystem Students Controller view_students.php addStudent cross site scripting
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability was identified in hemant6488 CodeIgniter-StudentManagementSystem. The impacted element is the function addStudent of the file view_students.php of the component Students Controller. The manipulation of the argument Name leads to cross site scripting. The attack is

cve.title: CVE-2026-9538 - Archive::Tar versions before 3.10 for Perl allow memory exhaustion via attacker controlled entry size field in tar header
cve.contentSnippet: Archive::Tar versions before 3.10 for Perl allow memory exhaustion via attacker controlled entry size field in tar header. _read_tar() reads each entry's payload with $handle->read($$data, $block), where $block is derived from the entry's 12-byte size field in the tar header with

cve.title: CVE-2026-42497 - Archive::Tar versions before 3.08 for Perl extract hardlinks to attacker controlled paths outside the extraction directory
cve.contentSnippet: Archive::Tar versions before 3.08 for Perl extract hardlinks to attacker controlled paths outside the extraction directory. _make_special_file() passes the tar header's linkname to link() without validating it against absolute paths or .. segments, creating a hardlink that shares

cve.title: CVE-2026-42496 - Archive::Tar versions before 3.08 for Perl extract symlinks with attacker controlled targets outside the extraction directory
cve.contentSnippet: Archive::Tar versions before 3.08 for Perl extract symlinks with attacker controlled targets outside the extraction directory. _make_special_file() passes the tar header's linkname to symlink() without validating it against absolute paths or .. segments. The secure-extract mode c

cve.title: CVE-2026-9517 - hemant6488 CodeIgniter-StudentManagementSystem Student Management addStudentView access control
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability was determined in hemant6488 CodeIgniter-StudentManagementSystem. The affected element is an unknown function of the file /index.php/students/addStudentView of the component Student Management Handler. Executing a manipulation can lead to improper access controls.

cve.contentSnippet: Perl versions through 5.43.10 have a heap buffer overflow when compiling regular expressions with a repeated fixed string on 32-bit builds. Perl_study_chunk in regcomp_study.c checked the size of the joined substring buffer in characters rather than bytes. For a quantified fixed

The affected element is the function setUnloadUserData of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi of the component Setting Handler. cve.title: CVE-2026-32389 - WordPress NanoCare theme < 1.2.2 - Broken Access Control vulnerability
cve.contentSnippet: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Linethemes NanoCare allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects NanoCare: from n/a before 1.2.2.

cve.contentSnippet: Missing Authorization vulnerability in SePay team SePay Gateway allows Retrieve Embedded Sensitive Data. This issue affects SePay Gateway: from n/a through 1.1.20.

cve.contentSnippet: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in eMagicOne eMagicOne Store Manager allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects eMagicOne Store Manager: from n/a through 1.3.2.

cve.contentSnippet: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Crocoblock JetEngine allows SQL Injection. This issue affects JetEngine: from n/a through 3.8.8.1.

cve.contentSnippet: Missing Authorization vulnerability in WebToffee Smart Coupons for WooCommerce allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels. This issue affects Smart Coupons for WooCommerce: from n/a before 2.3.0.

cve.title: CVE-2026-39436 - WordPress CformsII plugin <= 15.1.3 - Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability
cve.contentSnippet: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in bgermann CformsII allows Cross Site Request Forgery. This issue affects CformsII: from n/a through 15.1.3.

cve.contentSnippet: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Unlimited Elements For Elementor allows Blind SQL Injection. This issue affects Unlimited Elements For Elementor: from n/a through 2.0.8.
